description: ioxide — a shared-nothing io_uring runtime for .NET, consumed as its published NuGet packages (ioxide, ioxide.pg, ioxide.file). One ring per reactor thread: multishot accept/recv into provided buffer rings, inline IValueTaskSource continuations, raw-syscall io_uring (no liburing). The HTTP/1.1 handler (request line, headers, Content-Length + chunked bodies, keep-alive, pipelining, fragmented reads) is hand-written on the raw recv/send API; async-db rides ioxide.pg's ring-native pooled Postgres driver (SCRAM-SHA-256), static rides ioxide.file's baked asset snapshots.
